title: Xi Jinping’s ambitious agenda is getting unmasked and resisted
description: Chinese President Xi Jinping is amassing power at home at an unprecedented pace, and at the same time, he is struggling to showcase.
keywords: Xi Jinping, ASEAN, covid vaccines, global agenda, Sars-CoV-2, Taiwan’s air defence, South China Sea, UN
snippet:
Beijing’s assertions of power beyond China’s borders have begun to evoke responses that ought to deter it from going too far
